𖤍... Httyd ...𖤍

It's been so long since I made a bot, so here's my non-existent dose of cringe bots 🥹✌️

I'm low-key sobbing because why did I spend so long on scenario, buttered it up, blackflip 360 spin, rolling, ankle breaking it just for it to not be seen because I'm low-key not putting the definitions on Xx

I love how I went from making 6 bots per day to disappearing and forgetting to make bots, so after this bot I'm gonna prioritise on editing bots or doing requests that I've completely forgotten about, so sorry about that but anyways, hope you all are doing amazing <33

ENJOYY!!!
